name: Tencent CodeBuddy
description: Tencent Clouds AI coding assistant (云智码) with Plan mode, MCP support, SDK integration and custom sub-agents.

seo.title: Tencent CodeBuddy — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Tencent CodeBuddy: Tencent Clouds AI coding assistant (云智码) with Plan mode, MCP support, SDK integration and custom sub-agents.

when_to_use: Getting AI code completions backed by Tencent's Hunyuan model
Building with Tencent Cloud ecosystem integration via AI coding tool
Running code generation and review for WeChat mini-program dev
Accelerating backend development with Tencent's enterprise AI IDE

pros: Plan mode gives structured agent workflow for complex tasks
MCP support unlocks ecosystem of tool integrations
SDK enables custom sub-agents for team-specific workflows
Backed by Tencent Cloud with enterprise support
cons: Data routing through Tencent Cloud concerns non-Chinese teams
Less mature IDE polish than Copilot or Cursor
review.verdict: Credible agentic coding assistant for Tencent ecosystem teams; niche for everyone else.
review.best_for: Chinese teams on Tencent Cloud wanting Plan mode and MCP-based custom agents
review.not_for: Western teams with strict data residency or wanting polished English-first UX
